gui.openysm.model_settings.title: Model Settings
gui.openysm.roulette.too_long: The roulette's path is too long
gui.openysm.search.tip:
● Default: search model, info, author, folder
● Start with @ for author only, # for folder only
gui.openysm.model.info.contact.click_hin: Scroll to select. Click to copy or open.
gui.openysm.sync_hint.title: YSM Model Sync State:
gui.openysm.config.disable_self_model: Prevents rendering of self player's model
gui.openysm.config.disable_other_model: Prevents rendering of other player's model
gui.openysm.config.print_animation_roule: Whether to print animation roulette play message
gui.openysm.config.disable_self_hands: Prevents rendering of self player's hands
gui.openysm.config.blur_gui.desc: Frosted-glass blur behind YSM panels (roulette + model settings).
gui.openysm.model_info.title: Model Info
gui.openysm.texture_screen.title: Animations & Textures
gui.openysm.config.disable_self_model.de: Hide your own custom YSM model. Uses the vanilla Steve model instead.
gui.openysm.config.disable_other_model.d: Hide other players' custom YSM models.
gui.openysm.config.disable_self_hands.de: Hide custom hand model in first person view.
gui.openysm.config.disable_player_render: Disable the paper doll player preview.
gui.openysm.config.disable_external_firs: Disable first-person animations contributed by other mods.
gui.openysm.config.disable_loading_state: Hide the loading state corner badge.
gui.openysm.config.loading_state_positio: Choose where the loading state badge appears on screen.
gui.openysm.config.use_compatibility_ren: Use the slower but more compatible render path.
gui.openysm.config.use_gpu_renderer.desc: Enable the experimental GPU renderer. May have compatibility issues.
gui.openysm.config.print_animation_roule: Print a chat message when switching roulette animations.
gui.openysm.config.sound_volume.desc: Volume percentage for YSM model animation sounds.
gui.openysm.disclaimer.text:
Thank you for using the mod, please be sure to read the relevant terms carefully and agree to the terms:


1. The download and use of the mod is completely free, and the confidentiality of the model is not guaranteed in any form

2. The dev team does not participate in the relevant model transactions, please bear the responsibility for the transaction disputes arising

3. The creator enjoys the copyright of the model created, and also bears corresponding responsibilities, which has nothing to do with the dev team

4. Please do not create any models that violate laws and regulations. This production team is also opposed to any form of R18/NSFW content creation! We have never participated in any related content creation!
gui.openysm.disclaimer.read: I have read and agree the terms of use
gui.openysm.extra_player_render.tips:
Drag Green Square: Translate
Drag Blue Square: Scale
Right Drag: Rotate
Alt + R: Reset

[Press Esc To Exit]
gui.openysm.texture.button.empty.desc: Empty animation for debugging, please do not make any modifications

message.openysm.compatibility_warning.ta: YSM is incompatible with TAC mod with version below 0.3.7

modmenu.descriptionTranslation.openysm: This mod allows replacing the default player model and freely modifying appearance and animations. It supports Bedrock Edition format model and animation files.
